name: conduit
description: A business context tool that bridges the gap between LLM coding tools and business communication tools

businessContext.contextProvider.description: Which communication platform to pull business context from.

enumDescriptions: Claude Code SDK (agentic, multi-turn with MCP tools)
Mock Agent (echoes prompt, no file changes)
businessContext.codingAgent.description: Which AI coding tool to use for implementation.

businessContext.slack.userToken.description: Slack User OAuth Token (xoxp-...). Required when using Slack as context provider.

businessContext.slack.clientId.description: Slack app client ID for OAuth (get from api.slack.com/apps).

businessContext.slack.clientSecret.description: Slack app client secret for OAuth (get from api.slack.com/apps).

businessContext.slack.oauthProxyUrl.description: HTTPS proxy URL for Slack OAuth redirect (e.g. https://your-proxy.workers.dev). The proxy receives the OAuth callback and redirects to VS Code.

businessContext.claude.yoloMode.description: DANGEROUS: Let the coding agent auto-execute ALL tool calls without approval, including file writes, deletions, and shell commands that can harm your system. By enabling this, you accept full responsibility for any ensuing destruction.

businessContext.maxSearchResults.description: Maximum number of messages to retrieve per search.

businessContext.maxThreadMessages.description: Maximum number of messages to retrieve per thread.

scripts.test:all: vitest run && cd webview-ui && npm test
